summary: Phase 4 Client Ownership + Routing Control testing complete. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Client Reassignment page fully functional with stats, search, reassignment panel, and audit log.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Sales: neema.sales@konekt.demo / Sales123!, Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!
seed_data_creation: Test companies, contacts, and individuals created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Client Ownership complete. Companies stored in 'companies' collection with normalized_name and domain. Contacts in 'contacts' collection linked via company_id. Individuals in 'individual_clients' collection with owner_sales_id. Reassignment audit in 'reassignment_audit_log' collection. Ownership routing service at services/ownership_routing_service.py resolves owner via: exact company_id > contact email > individual email > phone > domain match > company name match > auto-assign. Sales visibility filter uses $or query on sales_owner_id and assigned_sales_owner_id fields.

1_company_crud.details: Creates company with normalized_name (strips Ltd/Inc/Corp suffixes) and lowercase domain. Returns id, name, normalized_name, domain, owner_sales_id, client_type='company'.

2_contact_crud.details: Creates contact linked to company_id. Email stored lowercase. Returns id, name, email, phone, company_id, position, client_type='contact'.

3_individual_crud.details: Creates individual client with owner_sales_id. Returns id, name, email, phone, owner_sales_id, client_type='individual'.

4_unified_search.details: Searches across companies, contacts, and individuals. Returns results with type, id, name, detail, owner_sales_id. Admin sees all; sales sees only owned.

5_ownership_stats.details: Returns total_companies, total_contacts, total_individuals, total_reassignments, unowned_companies, unowned_individuals.

6_admin_reassignment.details: Changes owner_sales_id on company or individual. Creates audit entry with entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, previous_owner_id/name, new_owner_id/name, reason, changed_by_id/name, created_at.

7_reassignment_audit_log.details: Returns audit history entries sorted by created_at descending. Each entry has entity_type, entity_name, previous_owner_name, new_owner_name, reason, changed_by_name, created_at.

8_ownership_routing_existing_company.details: CRM lead creation with email from known company domain resolves to existing company owner via domain match. Sets assigned_sales_owner_id, ownership_company_id, ownership_resolution='existing_company'.

9_ownership_routing_auto_assign.details: CRM lead creation with unknown contact auto-assigns new owner via sales_assignment_service scoring. Creates new company or individual entity. Sets ownership_resolution='new_company' or 'new_individual'.

10_request_ownership_routing.details: Request creation resolves owner via ownership_routing_service. Sets sales_owner_id, ownership_company_id, ownership_resolution on request document.

11_sales_visibility_leads.details: Sales user sees only leads where assigned_to matches their user_id. Admin sees all leads.

12_sales_visibility_requests.details: Sales user sees only requests where sales_owner_id or assigned_sales_owner_id matches their user_id. Admin sees all requests.

13_customer_access_denied.details: Customer role gets 403 Forbidden on all /api/admin/client-ownership/* endpoints.

14_admin_reassignment_page_ui.details: Page loads with stats row (6 stat cards), search panel with input and results, reassignment panel with selected entity details/new owner dropdown/reason textarea/confirm button, audit log table with entity/previous/new/reason/by/date columns.

15_sidebar_link.details: Client Ownership link visible in sidebar under Settings section.

16_regression_crm_lead.details: CRM lead creation still works with ownership routing integration.

17_regression_request.details: Request creation still works with ownership routing integration.

ownership_data_note: Test data created: Companies with TEST_ prefix, contacts linked to companies, individuals with owner_sales_id.
